name: BaseTreeItem
description:
Abstract base class for tree item components.
Defines the contract for tree item implementations with navigation, selection, and hierarchy support.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Sets focus on the tree item.

methods.name: setContainerTabIndex
methods.description: Sets the tabindex value for the item's container element.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The tabindex value (typically 0 for focusable, -1 for not focusable)

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Updates the ARIA position information for the item.

parameters.name: totalItemsCount
parameters.description: Total number of items in the set
